# pipetail

> AWS Advanced Tier Services Partner based in Prague, Czech Republic

pipetail builds and operates production-grade AWS infrastructure for growing SaaS companies. We specialize in multi-region platform engineering, Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud cost optimization.

## What We Do

- **AWS Platform Engineering**: Multi-region, multi-account AWS architectures — EKS, Aurora, CloudFront, and more. We design infrastructure that scales with your business, not against it.
- **Kubernetes & GitOps**: Production EKS platforms with ArgoCD, Helm, Bottlerocket, and Graviton. We build platforms your team can own.
- **Database Architecture**: Aurora PostgreSQL with cross-region replication, DynamoDB global tables, automated backups, and performance tuning.
- **Observability & Security**: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Datadog, CloudTrail, WAF, KMS encryption, and OIDC-based CI/CD — no static credentials.
- **Cloud Cost Optimization**: Infrastructure right-sizing, ARM64/Graviton migration, autoscaling, Savings Plans analysis, and spend visibility tooling.
- **Terraform / Infrastructure as Code**: Hundreds of thousands of lines of production Terraform. We bring your entire cloud estate into code.
- **Managed Operations & Oncall**: 24/7 and 8x5 oncall support arrangements. We stay involved after launch.
- **AWS partnership with pipetail**: Consolidated AWS billing with tailored invoicing.

## Process

We follow a three-phase approach:

1. **Discover**: Infrastructure audit, cost analysis, security review, architecture assessment, proofs-of-concept, and technical roadmap.
2. **Build**: Infrastructure as Code from day one, short iterations, dedicated point of contact, knowledge transfer throughout.
3. **Deliver**: Production hardening, observability setup, load testing, failover drills, go-live support, and ongoing oncall.

## Case Studies

- **Momence** (2023–2025): Migrated from DigitalOcean to AWS with zero downtime. Built a fully containerized GitOps platform with EKS, Aurora PostgreSQL, ArgoCD, real-time data pipeline (Debezium + Kafka + Snowflake), and cost visibility tooling. Momence grew from Y Combinator startup to $15M+ ARR.
- **Contember** (2023): Multi-region EKS platform with ArgoCD, Aurora PostgreSQL, and per-tenant AWS accounts. 40% lower infra costs, 3x business revenue, 2x engineering productivity.
- **Keboola** (2022): Migration from ECS to EKS for multi-cloud support. 40% lower compute costs, deployment time from 14 days to 3 hours, 100% Infrastructure as Code.
- **ShipMonk** (2022): EKS platform on AWS with multi-region architecture. 24/7 oncall support, 2x business revenue, 2x engineering productivity, 15% lower infra costs.

## Products

- **pipetail.cloud**: Customer-facing portal for AWS security compliance checks and cost optimization insights.
